mapper.select: select member_id, email, name, nickname, phone, profile_image_url, bio, email_verified, phone_verified, role, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from members where email = #{email} limit 1
select password_hash from members where email = #{email} limit 1
select password_hash from members where member_id = #{memberId} limit 1

select member_id, email, name, nickname, phone, profile_image_url, bio, email_verified, phone_verified, role, status, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from members where member_id = #{memberId} limit 1
mapper.update: update members set password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId}
update members set status = 'WITHDRAW', deleted_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00') where member_id = #{memberId}

update members
nickname = #{nickname}, bio = #{bio},
profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl},
updated_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00')
where member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_tbl WHERE follower_member_id = #{followerId} AND following_member_id = #{followingId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow_tbl (follower_member_id, following_member_id) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE created_at = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follow_tbl WHERE follower_member_id = #{followerId} AND following_member_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_tbl WHERE following_member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_tbl WHERE follower_member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_tbl WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM saved_post WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_post_like l JOIN post_tbl p ON l.post_id = p.post_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_tbl c JOIN post_tbl p ON c.post_id = p.post_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.deleted_yn = 'N' AND c.deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM saved_post s JOIN post_tbl p ON s.post_id = p.post_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.deleted_yn = 'N'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT l.post_id FROM user_post_like l JOIN post_tbl p ON l.post_id = p.post_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.deleted_yn = 'N' AND l.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), INTERVAL 7 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT c.post_id FROM comment_tbl c JOIN post_tbl p ON c.post_id = p.post_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.deleted_yn = 'N' AND c.deleted_yn = 'N' AND c.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), INTERVAL 7 DAY) UNION ALL SELECT s.post_id FROM saved_post s JOIN post_tbl p ON s.post_id = p.post_id WHERE p.member_id = #{memberId} AND p.deleted_yn = 'N' AND s.created_at >= DATE_SUB(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(6), '+00:00', '+09:00'), INTERVAL 7 DAY) ) t

SELECT m.member_id as memberId, m.name, m.nickname, m.email, m.profile_image_url as profileImageUrl, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_tbl f_check WHERE f_check.follower_member_id = #{loginId} AND f_check.following_member_id = m.member_id) as isFollowing, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_tbl f_check WHERE f_check.follower_member_id = m.member_id AND f_check.following_member_id = #{loginId}) as followsMe FROM follow_tbl f JOIN members m ON f.follower_member_id = m.member_id WHERE f.following_member_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT m.member_id as memberId, m.name, m.nickname, m.email, m.profile_image_url as profileImageUrl, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_tbl f_check WHERE f_check.follower_member_id = #{loginId} AND f_check.following_member_id = m.member_id) as isFollowing, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow_tbl f_check WHERE f_check.follower_member_id = m.member_id AND f_check.following_member_id = #{loginId}) as followsMe FROM follow_tbl f JOIN members m ON f.following_member_id = m.member_id WHERE f.follower_member_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
